title: Settings
description: Manage your account settings and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This is how others will see you on the site

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.description: Click avatar or button to upload a new photo
avatar.invalidFileType: Only JPEG, PNG and WebP images are allowed

email.label: Email
email.description: Your email address cannot be changed
email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

name.label: Display Name
name.description: This is your public display name (max 20 characters)
name.max: Display name must be 20 characters or less

bio.label: Bio
bio.description: Brief description for your profile (max 100 characters)
bio.max: Bio must be 100 characters or less

versionUpdate.title: Version Updates
versionUpdate.description: Get notified when new versions are released
